A '''Sailfish''' was a type of small [[Transport/Legends|transport]] produced by the [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari Shipyards]]. During the [[Swarm War]], [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] war profiteers [[Emala]], [[Grees]] and [[Sligh]] performed their business from a ship of this class, the ''[[Real Deal]]''. Han later arranged for the smugglers [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]] to have a ''Sailfish''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
